review_title: Great Resource for Tracking Website Metrics and SEO
description: Owning, operating and managing websites successfully requires that you track the many metrics of their performance. You want to know where best is your time spent in managing Search Engine Optimization and understanding the demographics of your target audience to ensure your websites are performing at their best. ProRankTracker.com allows me to see so much useful data on the performance of https://www.The-Golf-Experience.com and https://www.The-River-of-Life.com so I know best where these sites are performing well and in what areas they could use some work and improvement to perform better. I recommend ProRankTracker.com to anyone tasked with the responsibility of managing any website so they best know the metrics of how well they are performing.
author: Douglas C.
pros: I like most the numerous features of this program that allow me to track the many metrics across my websites to better know how well they are performing and where they need work.
cons: The only complaint I could register is the number of tracking metrics available. It can almost get overwhelming. But staying focused on the few that mena the most to me helps to stay on track.

review_title: Great to see how you are doing in SEO serp
description: Good. I want to see how I am doing in specific terms and it shows me
author: Tal L.
pros: Easy to use, review the website progress, suggestions for related terms. Keywords grouping, site audit and more features
cons: Each terms in each country considererd a different result and you pay per term, if we are talking about reach results, it's another separated term, mobile results, another one. I don't use a lot of the tools, sometimes suggestions are irrelevant

review_title: This product is expensive and no longer the best option
description: Support is arrogant when you reach out to them. It's clear the money has got to their head. These guys went big time now. After contacting support they pushed me to their smaller company Rankitor for better pricing - I suggest you check it out.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software is probably the industry standard.
cons: The pricing is 2-3x that of anything else on the market. It's overpriced. They offered free accounts in their early days but since removed that option as they are "big enough" now. $25/mo entry point is extremely ovepriced in this space. If you want to track one keyword, it's $25, when in reality, anyone in this space knows one keyword tracking is $10 or less normally.

review_title: My experience with pro rank tracker as SEO Specilist
description: How the process to the end of the month and to see clarify if my strategies it's working or not.
author: EDUARDO R.
pros: In my case, I can see how is my organic increase because I can see the position of all my selected keywords thas amazing only I need to check early morning on my email, and see what's happening with my process to rank.
cons: It's confusing sometimes to understand all the reports you have to read the documentation to understand the purpose of this report, I don't like the user experiences there are a lot of buttons around.

review_title: Good tool for following rankings on SERP
author: Vladas S.
pros: I like, that this tool has free plan and it is enough for me to track 20 keywords. If somebody needs to track keywords for multiple websites, one may always create multiple accounts. It is convenient for me to get a daily email with my ranking changes. I check those emails on daily basis.
cons: Not many features, but still too complex setup and configuration. It takes time to understand how it is organized, because it is not so intuitive.

review_title: The best ranking dashboard you could find
author: Silviu C.
pros: Great results, very high accurate results, you can slit results for a given keyword by location, browser, device, and so on. Their are highly customizable for everyone who needs a different and accurate perspective to look at things. Daily updates and reporting
cons: Not being able to measure social media, just video is a huge minus for this great team, but the price is really good, will kepp using into the feature.

review_title: Accurate rank tracker software! Worth the money.
description: I love using it. It provides search volume and an accurate rank tracker.
author: Albert A.
pros: 1. ProRankTracker is affordable. The lowest plan lets me to track up to 300 terms and unlimited URLs. 2. Exact search volume is accurate. 3. Tracking local keywords are also accurate. 4. I can update my keywords on demand. 5. Higher plans lets you have a dedicated account manager to help you anytime. 6. User interface is clean and it is easy to use. 7. Supports many different languages.
cons: I do no have any complaints. It works great and its pretty accurate.

review_title: For SEO expert and Agency like my marketing company, we use ProRankTracker for better Analysis
description: ProRankTracker has been used to offer my Freelance Digital Marketing Services at Fiverr and Upwork making me more professional and exceptional in my gigs.
author: awogor M.
pros: ProRankTracker gives much more analysis to clients to better understand how their web pages are performing on Search Engine Result Pages such as Google.com and Bing.com. It's a tool that helps you to check what you need to do in order to improve your website on search engines. It also helps you to track your position on Serps, analytics and even more of Reporting.
cons: the terminology used by PRT may not be understood by the novice who doesn't know much more about SEO (Search Engine Optimization) It's also not priced friendly just like ahrefs which made it more difficult for the populace to use it not because they don't like it but because they can't afford it.

review_title: A Very Good Rank Tracking Solution
author: Calin H.
pros: This is a very good rank tracking program that allows you to track ranks daily. You get automated emails and can customize what you see. It's very customizable and easy to go in and see where you are ranking. If you are working with clients then you can give them a link or view through their app where they can quickly look and see where they are ranking at any time rather than pulling up a report document which is very nice.
cons: With any software where you can sort data in a hundred different ways, you can get a little lost. Just trying to find daily rankings in an at-a-glance view takes a few steps which is a little annoying. It's not a perfect solution, but it's one of the best daily rank tracking programs available.

review_title: Great for daily tracking
description: If you need a rank tracker and nothing else, this tool is perfect
author: Igor G.
pros: It tracks keywords without tying them to your domain specifically so you can track your competitor's rankings as well. It has direct integration with WordPress which I personally find more comfortable than standalone version since I visit wp admin panel quite often. Tracks all types of SERPs.
cons: Low on functionality, most SEO tools today provide a number of products including rank tracker so it's hard to justify using a separate RT tool

review_title: I can now monitor my website's rankings easily.
description: It is great for monitoring keywords.
author: John M.
pros: Thanks to their friendly user-interface, I was able to view and monitor my website's rankings easily. Their rank tracker is fast and accurate too. Creating a report is easy and it's easy to understand as well. ProRankTracker is also affordable and they can definitely help you to monitor your keyword rankings.
cons: Because it is a web-based program, sometimes their program is slow to operate.

review_title: Pretty Good but Not for Amazon
description: In general the product is good as far as the feature set and capabilities. However as an Amazon only user it has some significant issues that make it not ideal for Amazon and specifically for sharing reports with clients. The main issue is that the system is completly URL based. There is no way to give a URL a name. https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01L85H3EG doesn't mean anything to anyone. It doesn't give you any idea what ProRankTracker is reporting on. I need to be able to tell PRT that https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01L85H3EG is actually a product named: Widget A and have that be what is shown on the URL view, term view etc. In addition, the comparison reports are not designed for multi-client. It wants you to select which items to compare but doesn't let you select groups or tags so that you can do a comparison of just one product group from week to week or month to month. So these comparison reports are completely useless to me because I have 1000 URLs in the list. Furthermore, they aren't just useless because you can't pick groups and basically segment your reporting by client, but also because you can give the URL's names. I get a list like this: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01L85H3EG https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01L85H3TH https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01L85H3SK https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01L85H3KW and it asks me which ones i want to compare. Again, none of those selections mean ANYTHING to me. I don't know what product is B01L85H3KW So while the website says it works for Amazon it doesn't really work for Amazon. It has major gaps in terms of its' ability to provide useful, actionable data for Amazon.
author: Jeremy H.
pros: Good feature set, bulk upload, nice reports.
cons: No way to 'name' a URL, can't run comparison reports by Groups.

review_title: It's a great tool to check my rankings and website's performance.
author: Dexter T.
pros: It is a fast and accurate rank tracking tool to track my keywords. ProRankTracker also allows me to check my mobile and desktop rankings. Their blog is really useful too! It contains a lot of tips and latest news about SEO and digital marketing. Another great feature of ProRankTracker is their pricing. It is really competitive and in my opinion, it is affordable.
cons: I couldn't ask for more. It has all the tools that I need to track my keywords.

review_title: Great Service
description: The team responds to my emails and tickets FAST! They are always willing to help and answer any questions that I have. I have been a customer for quite a while and have even upgraded my account. Very happy and loyal customer!
author: Erik B.
pros: Great email reports. Love being able to send them to clients with white label versions.
cons: Would love to see new features added. Nothing particular, but SEO is always changing and would love to see the company add new features and keep providing great service.

review_title: Great Ranking Tracker
description: Been using this for 3 plus years. Excellent features and value. Online customer support is very good
author: Kevin B.
pros: Ability to sorth through rank and present reports in a myriad of ways.
cons: Dashboard can not be customized as much as I would like.

review_title: I am very happy with ProRankTracker
description: I was very surprised with the quality of ProRankTracker. The system is easy to use and priced very well. It is great that you can get all required functionality for 2 websites for free! That's always a benefit especially if one wants to evaluate quality of a software. That's exactly what we did. We had started with free account and were impressed with the accuracy of results. Now we are on Silver account and it is very well priced for the amount of functionality we get in return.
author: Greg P.
pros: accuracy of the results, free account, good pricing scheme, excellent and timely support, nice interface, api available
cons: unfortunately gives little on demand updates

review_title: The Best I've Found
description: I've only had cause to contact customer support a couple of times - once to ask about a function and the other to suggest a function, both times I was impressed with the speed at which they came back to me. I also really appreciate the speed at which they react to the big G changing policies or results.
author: Gideon R.
pros: Accurate, clear, well presented data.
cons: This is mainly a result of Bing results fluctuating more than Google but the major movers aspect tends to focus on Bing - have spoken to Cust Support about a filter to apply to the report so I can filter out Bing and its jumpiness.

review_title: A rank tracking solution to settle on
description: I have been working in the digital marketing space for 11 years, and over 5 years as an agency owner. During that time I have had an increasing need to be able to track keyword rankings for mine and my client sites in the organic search engine results pages. While SEO is about much more that 'keywords' these days, it remains and extremely useful barometer, to be able to able to monitor positions of a website over time, for keywords that are highly relevant to the business in question. It's also advantageous to be able to monitor your competitors too. To achieve this goal, there are many different rank tracking software solutions out there, of varying quality and to meet various budgets. I have been a paying subscriber of 9 of these over the years, and without a doubt, Pro Rank Tracker is the only one that I feel meets all my needs, as well as being the most reliable tool out there. Its the only one I use these days for my own sites, for clients, for reporting & for analysis & research. There are a wide variety of different report types to suit all needs, and they even have a smartphone app you can customize for clients. From tracking daily shifts and ranking URLs through to summarized view of the total volume of keywords you have in the number 1 spot on Google, PRT covers it all. I am happily settled on this as my rank tracking solution and don't spend a second thinking about alternatives or wondering if there is a better option out there. It just works, and I love it!
author: Simon S.

review_title: Great rank tracking tool
description: Proranker just plain works. If you need to track your websites or videos ranking then Pro Ranker is a tool you should use. It allows us to see where our rankings are on a daily basis and respond/inspect/change items as needed to keep them on top of the search engines.
author: jeff Y.
pros: Once setup it just keeps track and sends email without my constant input or tweaking.
cons: It was difficult to setup a significant amount of videos that am tracking. Had to set each one up individually which took more time than should have been if able to bulk upload the urls/video. What should have taken 15-20 minutes took over 5 hours to upload.

review_title: Great serp tracking software, most customizable of all of them
author: Fabian P.
pros: We are a company based on internet searches traffic, our top keywords have very strong competition, so after searching for dozens of exact and practical software to track and report we manage to find proranktracker.com. It is a succes story with up to date reports, mobile and local rankings which gives us the whole picture every day.
cons: I consider the insight being a great analytical tool, the most functionality in my opinion on a budget is a plan, the lower ones are just not practical.

review_title: Overall the best service for large scale enterprise rank tracking!
description: This is a great service. I love the automated reporting, tags, device rankings and progress reports. The only issue I have is that sometimes low traffic volume rankings are inaccurate by about 1 spot, but 99.9% of the time the rankings reflected are accurate.
author: Paul S.
pros: Tags, automated reporting, device rankings, location rankings, sub-users
cons: 0.01% of the time the rankings are off by 1.

review_title: feel about ProRankTracker
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Pro Rank Tracker is pretty good, I can add or edit the URL, especially I can track the video position on Youtube, update the rankings as required.
cons: It sometimes slow but generally satisfied
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An invaluable tool for your online arsenal
description: Couldn't be without this fantastic service now. The accuracy of the results is bang on and I have used other services before that report incorrectly or are buggy but there are no worries of that here.
author: Jonathan P.
pros: Speed, stability, wide array of options and accuracy and great reports.
cons: Nothing

review_title: Great rank tracking software
description: I have been using ProRankTracker for several months at the time of writing. I am very happy to get such great insights and great reports. I use ProRankTracker for reporting positions to clients and though it can be a bit complex here and there, it's a great tool that does the job I want it to do: Report organic, organic local, local and mobile positions in Google to my clients. And it's not even very expensive.

pros: Customizable reports, all kinds of rankings available
cons: Ease of using it not always as intuitive as I would expect. I guess it's all a matter of personal logic ;-)

review_title: The reporting is worth it
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I actually found Pro Rank Tracker when I was looking for the SEO powe suite. I've used Pro Rank Tracker for a few months and the reporting function is visually fantastic. I'm quickly and easily able to churn out keyword reports for some of the C-level folks to show solid growth but additionally it helps me to give the content folks a better perspective on what pieces are accumulating long and short-tail keywords for each post. It's been easy to get up and running and they're quick to respond with any customer service questions. I'm starting to experiment with this tool for youtube rankings, really interesting stuff. Keep it up!
cons: It would be more helpful to have a lot of video tutorials for some of the more advanced features that continue to roll out.
